description: Rear-ended at traffic lights on Pacific Motorway. Damage to rear bumper, boot lid, and tailgate sensors.
notes: Third party admitted fault. Repair completed at approved repairer.

description: Severe hailstorm caused roof damage, broken skylights, and water ingress to upstairs bedrooms.
notes: Assessor inspection scheduled for 2024-10-28. Temporary tarping completed.

description: Vehicle stolen from shopping centre car park overnight. Police report filed (QP2024-1187).
notes: Vehicle not recovered. Market value assessment completed. Settlement accepted.

description: Kitchen pipe burst causing water damage to flooring and cabinetry.
notes: Claim rejected: pipe corrosion identified as gradual deterioration, not sudden event. Not covered under policy section 4.2.

description: Emergency appendectomy, 2 night hospital stay. Private hospital, private room.
notes: Pre-approval not required for emergency. Gap payment $180 after Medicare offset.

description: Rock chip to windscreen on Bruce Highway expanded to full crack. Windscreen requires full replacement.
notes: Windscreen replacement — no excess applicable under comprehensive policy. Awaiting repairer availability.

description: Kitchen fire caused by unattended stove. Damage to kitchen, dining room ceiling, and smoke damage throughout house.
notes: Repairs complete. Temporary accommodation covered for 6 weeks under additional living expenses clause.

description: Side impact collision at intersection. Driver side door and front quarter panel damage.
notes: Liability under investigation. Dashcam footage requested from claimant.

description: Specialist orthopaedic consultation and MRI for knee injury. GP referral provided.
notes: Full benefit paid. MRI pre-approved under extras cover.

description: Break-in through rear window. Laptop, jewellery, and TV stolen. Window and door frame damaged.
notes: Police report filed. Contents itemisation form sent to claimant. Awaiting receipts.

description: Hail storm caused denting to bonnet, roof, and boot lid. No windscreen damage.
notes: Paintless dent removal used. Completed within 2 weeks.

description: Flooding from nearby creek entered garage and ground floor living area.
notes: Claim rejected: property not covered for flood under current policy. Flood cover was not selected at renewal.
